nodes.name: all-types.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf test schema defining a message with all scalar and nested types to validate the connector codec's handling of the full Protobuf type system.

nodes.name: any-schema.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf test schema using `google.protobuf.Any` fields to test codec handling of dynamically typed Protobuf messages.

nodes.name: complex-schema.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf test schema with nested messages and repeated fields to validate complex structure decoding in the connector codec.

nodes.name: id_type.json
nodes.summary: JSON test fixture defining an Avro/JSON schema with an `id` field of a specific type, used for codec deserialization tests.

nodes.name: opentelemetry_common.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema for OpenTelemetry common data types (AnyValue, KeyValue, etc.), used as a realistic test fixture for the connector codec's Protobuf decoding.

nodes.name: recursive.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf test schema with self-referential (recursive) message definitions to validate the codec's handling of recursive type structures.

nodes.name: simple-schema.proto
nodes.summary: Minimal Protobuf test schema with a few basic fields for baseline codec deserialization testing.
